meta.note: v6 uses four shape panels + f0_gate + gamma; no Bell E(XXX) in this module.

interpretation: Joint failure when rho leaves 2.35 (fixed bw) is dominated by atomic_clock_modes + f0_gate: cavity length uses L ∝ (rho/RHO_REF)^alpha with RHO_REF=2.35 in v6, so f0_ripple matches Cs f0 only at rho=RHO_REF; misaligned Gaussian vs qm_atomic also breaks shape (nrmse, r2).
MRI gamma gate is algebraically exact (gamma_rel_err=0); laser and semiconductor panels can remain shape_pass while atomic fails.
